== Notes for [[Item:Q112746|Q112746]] ==

Infanta de Navarra.

--------------

''[http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/SPANISH%20NOBILITY%20LATER%20MEDIEVAL.htm#_Toc343597697 Chapter 27. OTHER NOBLE FAMILIES in CASTILE & LEÓN ]''

1. NUÑO Menéndez . Maybe identified as the conde Núño Menéndez who was defeated and killed when he launched a rebellion against García King of Galicia in early 1071[3022]. He was named as father of Gómez and Fernando in a charter issued by the latter 27 Dec 1127[3023].

m '''SANCHA Viegas''', daughter of ---. Barton names Gómez Núñez as son of Nuño Menéndez and Sancha Viegas[3024]. Nuño & his wife had [three] children:

-------------

'''Sancha Gomes de Sousa''' (c. 1035 -?), casada com Nuno de Celanova (c. 1030 - ?), filho de Sancho Nunes de Celanova (c. 1070 - c. 1130).[2]

*https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gomes_Echigues

-------

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
